# Financial Compliance Ledger

> Immutable, event-sourced audit trail for financial discrepancies

## What it does
Consumes discrepancy events from a Transaction Reconciliation Engine via NATS JetStream, writes them to an append-only ledger, enforces configurable escalation workflows (acknowledge → investigate → resolve), generates regulatory-ready PDF reports, and pushes escalation alerts through an Event-Driven Notification Hub. Every mutation is an immutable event — nothing is updated, nothing is deleted.

## Target users
- Financial compliance teams in regulated European markets (PSD2, DSGVO, MaRisk)
- Organizations needing audit-proof discrepancy tracking
- Teams using the broader Klevar ecosystem (Transaction Reconciliation Engine, Notification Hub, RAG Platform)

## Architecture
- **Language:** Go 1.22+
- **Framework:** Chi router (HTTP) + standard library
- **Database:** PostgreSQL 16 (append-only event tables)
- **Event Bus:** NATS JetStream (durable event consumption)
- **Report Generation:** wkhtmltopdf (HTML → PDF)
- **Deployment:** Docker on Hetzner VPS
- **Multi-tenant:** API key auth, tenant-scoped queries

## API Surface
| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | /api/discrepancies | List discrepancies with filters |
| GET | /api/discrepancies/:id | Single discrepancy with event timeline |
| POST | /api/discrepancies/:id/acknowledge | Acknowledge a discrepancy |
| POST | /api/discrepancies/:id/investigate | Start investigation |
| POST | /api/discrepancies/:id/resolve | Resolve with resolution type |
| POST | /api/discrepancies/:id/notes | Add note |
| GET | /api/rules | List escalation rules |
| POST | /api/rules | Create escalation rule |
| PUT | /api/rules/:id | Update escalation rule |
| DELETE | /api/rules/:id | Delete escalation rule |
| GET | /api/reports | List reports |
| POST | /api/reports | Request report generation |
| GET | /api/reports/:id/download | Download PDF report |
| GET | /api/stats | Aggregate statistics |
| GET | /api/tenants/me | Current tenant profile |
| POST | /api/tenants/register | Self-register new tenant |
| GET | /health | Health check (NATS + PG status) |
| GET | /metrics | Prometheus metrics |

## Integrations
| System | Direction | Method |
|--------|-----------|--------|
| Transaction Reconciliation Engine | ← inbound | NATS JetStream |
| Event-Driven Notification Hub | → outbound | REST API |
| Multi-Agent RAG Platform | → outbound | REST API |

## Getting started
```bash
git clone https://github.com/kingsleyonoh/Financial-Compliance-Ledger.git
cd Financial-Compliance-Ledger
cp .env.example .env
docker compose up -d          # Start PostgreSQL + NATS
go run cmd/server/main.go     # Start server
```

- [PRD](docs/financial-compliance-ledger_prd.md) — full product specification
- [Codebase Context](.agent/rules/CODEBASE_CONTEXT.md) — modules, schema, patterns
